label: Search Knowledge Base
description: Search a knowledge base and return grounded context for the agent to reason over.

inputSchema.label: Query
inputSchema.description: Search query or question to retrieve relevant documents.

inputSchema.label: Knowledge Base
inputSchema.description: Stable knowledge base id to search.

inputSchema.label: Result Limit
inputSchema.description: Maximum number of retrieved passages to include.

outputSchema.label: Knowledge Base
outputSchema.description: Resolved knowledge base id used for retrieval.

outputSchema.label: Query
outputSchema.description: Final query string used for retrieval.

outputSchema.label: Result Count
outputSchema.description: Number of matched passages returned by the search.

outputSchema.label: Context
outputSchema.description: Ranked grounded excerpts formatted for direct agent reasoning.

outputSchema.label: Results
outputSchema.description: Structured retrieval results with section, url, summary, and score.

outputSchema.label: Citations
outputSchema.description: Compact source list suitable for run detail and answer citations.
